title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 06 2021
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 06 2021
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 06 2021
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 06/12/2021
DCE iron ore futures tight ,the main contract 2205 closed 615.5, an increase of 1.57% throughout the day. the quotation in the morning wasincreased by 20 yuan/mt from last Friday. some traders were active to sell, and steel mills purchased still on demand.
